ch: 我的好朋友叫kadrw，他也是排灣族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is kadrw, and he is also an Paiwan child.

ab: na maciyul a men a kisupu i kaaluwan.
en: We study together in the kaaluwan tribe.

ab: djaluljes amen a maciyul kilangda ta djawcikel a milimilimgan na lamaljeng, macaqu amen qivu ta pinaywanan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說排灣語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Paiwan proficiently.

ab: ljavavaw aken sa mekaca, ti kadrw maliljay sa kedrikedri.
ch: 我很高也很胖，kadrw很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while kadrw is short and thin.

ab: lu talivakan ti kadraw, djengelay a men djay madju a mapuljat.
ch: kadrw很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: kadrw is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
